links.title: pablostanley/typexperiments
links.description: Kinetic typography engine powered by Pretext. Smooth per-character text animations on Canvas.

links.title: TypeBeat — drum machine from text
links.description: Alexander Chen made a drum machine entirely out of text using Pretext + Gemini. Each character triggers a sound.

links.title: BioMap — 52 biomarker blocks
links.description: Kevin Ho: 52 biomarker blocks that expand as you explore, reflowing text across every block every frame. 0.04ms for all 52 layouts.

links.title: Knuth-Plass justification via Pretext
links.description: Yining Karl Li implemented Knuth-Plass text justification algorithm on a blog using Pretext under the hood.

links.title: jasagiri/nim-pretext
links.description: Nim WASM port of pretext text layout engine — up to 9.5x faster than JS.

links.title: mateffy/pretext-php
links.description: PHP port of chenglou/pretext with ICU segmentation and injectable font measurement.

links.title: jameslcowan/pretext-wars
links.description: Space-themed interactive showcase — destroy poetry with your spaceship.

links.title: ShipItAndPray/pretext-slides
links.description: Presentation tool rendering slides in Canvas with Pretext text layout. Write markdown, present anywhere.

links.title: Pretext.js Tutorial
links.description: How to install Pretext from npm and start measuring text layout in JS/TS.

links.title: Pretext: TypeScript library for multiline text measurement
links.description: Main HN launch thread. 388 points, 70 comments.
